message:
polish: apply concept decomposition failure-mode contrast + SVG glow

From the interactive-visualization-creator skill:

Concept Decomposition (failure mode contrast):
- Region Tree: callout explaining tokio orphan task problem
- Stale Handles: callout explaining ABA problem in runtimes
  without generation counters
- Cascade Close: callout explaining O(N²) manual cleanup
  coordination in tokio/Node.js vs scope.close()

Visual Primitives (active state glow):
- Cancel state machine active node uses SVG glow filter
- Outcome lattice selected node uses SVG glow filter
- Consistent with skill rule: "Active state always has glow"

CSS: Added callout-contrast utility classes (danger/success/
info/accent) for reusable "what goes wrong without this" boxes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
